title: Arcane wallpaper
description:
[h1]Arcane Dashboard: Interactive Fantasy Shelf[/h1]
An interactive shelf wallpaper with stock tickers and a system info codex, set in a candle-lit fantasy study. Designed to blend a cozy, mystical aesthetic with high-utility desktop widgets.

[i]Note: Designed for 3440×1440 ultrawide displays. Other resolutions may work but are not officially supported.[/i]

[h2]Features[/h2]
[list]
[*] [b]Reactive Stock Tickers:[/b] Track up to 4 stocks/cryptos, each represented as a book on the shelf. Books glow green or red based on the day's gain or loss. The intensity scales with the % change — small moves stay calm, while big swings glow brightly and emit colored direction-tied sparkles.
[*] [b]Interactive Panels & Sparklines:[/b] Click any book to open its dashboard. Panels show live price, change, volume, and a sparkline chart over your chosen range (1d / 5d / 1mo / 6mo / 1y / 5y). Drag panels around the desk freely; multiple can be open at once.
[*] [b]Magical Runestones:[/b] Runestones light up at the base of the shelf (one per active ticker) with slow-rising purple embers.
[*] [b]System Codex:[/b] The SYSTEM book glows soft violet, intensifying with CPU usage. Click it to open the System Codex.
[*] [b]Atmospheric Ambient:[/b] Features a synchronized 60-second day/night atmosphere cycle where the candle flame, lantern halos, and ambient light breathe in unison, while ambient dust motes drift through the scene.
[/list]

[h2]Setup & Configuration[/h2]
[list]
[*] Set your preferred stock tickers directly in the wallpaper's properties panel inside Wallpaper Engine.
[/list]

[h2]Optional Companion App (Hardware Stats)[/h2]
The System Codex shows FPS by default. For full live CPU, GPU, RAM, VRAM, and power stats, you need to install the [b]hwinfo-bridge[/b] companion app. It works perfectly with the free version of HWiNFO.

[b]Download HWiNFO Bridge Companion App:[/b]
[url=https://github.com/RainyTea/hwinfo-bridge]HWiNFO bridge[/url]

[b]Wallpaper GitHub Repository:[/b]
[url=https://github.com/RainyTea/arcane-wallpaper]Wallpaper repository[/url]

***

[b]Tags / Keywords:[/b]
#Arcane #Fantasy #Magic #Witchcraft #DarkAcademia #Medieval #Runes #Candle #Lantern #Mystical #Cozy #Dark #Violet #Purple #Green #Red #Interactive #Web #Customizable #SystemMonitor #Hardware #CPU #GPU #FPS #StockTicker #Stocks #Finance #Crypto #Animated #Embers #Particles #Clean #Desktop #Utility #Dashboard #Ultrawide #3440x1440

stock_instruction.text: Stocks — enter up to 4 tickers, one per field (e.g. NVDA). Leave blank to skip.

performance_instruction.text: Performance — turn individual effects off to save GPU/CPU
